message:
Add admin mode UI for hiding sessions and projects

- AppShell: add headerRight prop for admin toggle button
- Index route: read ?admin=1 param, pass includeHidden to all queries,
  preserve admin param across all navigation actions
- SessionCard: show hide/unhide button in admin mode, dim hidden sessions
- Project sidebar: show hide/unhide button per project in admin mode,
  dim hidden projects

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
